goal: Build a 2x3 layer-stack palletizer: a UR10 robot picks uniform 0.10m boxes from an infeed conveyor and places them in a 2-column × 3-row grid on a 0.70×0.50m pallet behind the robot. Six drop-target positions are pre-computed using the grid_2x3 pattern geometry (pallet centre ± col/row offsets) and passed to setup_pick_place_controller as a drop_targets dict; a proximity sensor at the pick point triggers each pick cycle. Exercises UR10 reach envelope, grid placement math, and cuRobo multi-target drop_targets dispatch for industrial palletizing.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-palletizer-layer-stack:

1) Robot and reach geometry: UR10 (reach ~1.3m) mounted on a 0.75m table (effective tool height ~1.6m from floor). Robot base at [0, 0, 0.75]. Pallet at [0, -0.55, 0.775] — centre 0.55m behind robot base. Grid spans ±0.15m in X and 0 to +0.40m in Y from pallet centre. Maximum horizontal distance from robot base to far pallet corner ≈ sqrt(0.15^2 + (0.55+0.20)^2) ≈ 0.76m — well inside 1.3m reach. Conveyor in front at y=+0.45, belt top at z=0.805; boxes are 0.10m cubes so box top at z=0.905, box centre at z=0.855.

2) Grid layout: compute_stack_placement(target='/World/Pallet', pattern='grid_2x3', n_items=6, cube_size=0.10, spacing=0.12, anchor='top') yields positions at pallet_top_z=0.825 + 0.10/2 = 0.875 with xy offsets: col 0 at x=-0.12, col 1 at x=+0.12; row 0 at y=-0.51, row 1 at y=-0.55, row 2 at y=-0.59 (rows separated by 0.04m gap between 0.10m-wide boxes). The 6 drop targets are pre-computed at canonical-author time and baked into drop_targets dict — no runtime tool composition needed.

3) Conveyor and box placement: Infeed conveyor 3m long at y=0.45, surface_velocity=[0.15, 0, 0]. 6 boxes placed at x in [-1.6, -1.3, -1.0, -0.7, -0.4, -0.1], all outside robot's 0.65m front reach so conveyor has travel distance before pick. Belt top = 0.78+0.025=0.805; box centre z=0.855. Proximity sensor at [0.35, 0.45, 0.855] fires when a box enters the pick window.

4) Physics: CPU dynamics (enable_gpu_dynamics=False, broadphase_type=MBP) for determinism. Box mass default 1 kg; rubber material reduces sliding on pallet. sleepThreshold=0.0 keeps boxes simulated through settle phase.

5) cuRobo motion planner handles UR10 naturally; EE_INITIAL_HEIGHT = max(box_on_belt_z, max_drop_z) + 0.20 = 0.875 + 0.20 = 1.075m. All drop targets at identical z=0.875 (single-layer stack), so transit height is constant. Future extension: two-layer version raises drop z by one box height (0.10m) for layer 2.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")

# Robot table / base platform
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics scene: CPU dynamics for determinism ───────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── UR10 robot ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# UR10 has ~1.3m reach. Mounted on 0.75m table. Pallet 0.55m behind at y=-0.55.
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="ur10",
    dest_path="/World/UR10",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── Infeed conveyor ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 3m long conveyor in front of robot; belt top at z = 0.78+0.025 = 0.805.
# slow belt (0.15 m/s) to allow reliable picks.
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.45, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.15, 0, 0],
)

# ── 6 uniform boxes (0.10m cubes) ────────────────────────────────────────────
# All outside robot reach (<0.65m front) so conveyor transport is meaningful.
# Box centre z = belt_top(0.805) + box_size/2(0.05) = 0.855.
box_paths = [f"/World/Box_{i+1}" for i in range(6)]
box_x_positions = [-1.6, -1.3, -1.0, -0.7, -0.4, -0.1]

for i, (path, x) in enumerate(zip(box_paths, box_x_positions)):
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.45, 0.855], size=0.10)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=box_paths,
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in box_paths:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# ── Pallet (0.70×0.50×0.05m platform) ────────────────────────────────────────
# scale=[0.35, 0.25, 0.025] because USD Cube is 2m unit → half-extents.
# Pallet top z = 0.775 + 0.025 = 0.800.
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Pallet",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, -0.55, 0.775],
    scale=[0.35, 0.25, 0.025],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pallet", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Pick proximity sensor ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    position=[0.35, 0.45, 0.855],
    size=[0.12, 0.12, 0.12],
)

# ── Pre-computed 2x3 grid drop targets ───────────────────────────────────────
# compute_stack_placement(target='/World/Pallet', pattern='grid_2x3',
#   n_items=6, cube_size=0.10, spacing=0.12, anchor='top')
# → pallet_top_z = 0.800; drop_z = 0.800 + 0.10/2 = 0.875
# Grid: 2 cols (x = -0.12, +0.12 from pallet centre x=0)
#        3 rows (y = -0.47, -0.55, -0.63 from pallet centre y=-0.55 + row offsets)
# Row offsets from pallet centre: row0=+0.08, row1=0.00, row2=-0.08
# Effective y positions: row0=-0.47, row1=-0.55, row2=-0.63
drop_targets = {
    "/World/Box_1": [-0.12, -0.47, 0.875],
    "/World/Box_2": [ 0.12, -0.47, 0.875],
    "/World/Box_3": [-0.12, -0.55, 0.875],
    "/World/Box_4": [ 0.12, -0.55, 0.875],
    "/World/Box_5": [-0.12, -0.63, 0.875],
    "/World/Box_6": [ 0.12, -0.63, 0.875],
}

# ── cuRobo pick-place controller ──────────────────────────────────────────────
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=box_paths,
    destination_path="/World/Pallet",
    drop_targets=drop_targets,
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Pallet"],
)
failure_modes: UR10 URDF not found in robot_wizard registry — robot_name='ur10' must match the registered asset key; if it fails, try 'UR10' (capitalised) or confirm the UR10 USD is on Nucleus.

Box overshoots pick sensor due to belt velocity — pick sensor at x=0.35 only fires for boxes near pick range; if belt is too fast, Box_6 (x=-0.1) may pass before pick sequence starts. Reduce surface_velocity to 0.10 m/s if misses occur.

Grid slot overlap collision — 0.10m boxes placed at 0.12m col-spacing leaves only 0.02m clearance. If PhysX broadphase reports contact at settle, increase spacing to 0.14m (re-run compute_stack_placement with spacing=0.14).

EE_INITIAL_HEIGHT insufficient for boxes near pallet edge — drop targets all at z=0.875; EE clears at 1.075m. If cuRobo generates colliding paths, verify _compute_h1 considers all DROP_TARGETS.values() (inherited from CP-09 handler fix).

Pallet collision mesh too thin — pallet scale=[0.35, 0.25, 0.025] gives 0.05m thick slab. If boxes fall through at high drop speed, increase z-scale to 0.05 (0.10m thick slab) and adjust pallet position z down by 0.025m.
code_template:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

box_paths = [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}, {{workpieces[4].path}}, {{workpieces[5].path}}]

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.10)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.10)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size=0.10)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[3].position}}, size=0.10)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[4].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[4].position}}, size=0.10)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[4].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[5].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[5].position}}, size=0.10)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[5].path}}, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=box_paths,
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in box_paths:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_prim(
    prim_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    prim_type="Cube",
    position={{primary_destination.position}},
    scale={{primary_destination.scale}},
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    position={{pick_sensor.position}},
    size={{pick_sensor.size}},
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=box_paths,
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    drop_targets={
        {{workpieces[0].path}}: {{workpieces[0].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[1].path}}: {{workpieces[1].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[2].path}}: {{workpieces[2].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[3].path}}: {{workpieces[3].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[4].path}}: {{workpieces[4].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[5].path}}: {{workpieces[5].drop_target}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{primary_destination.path}}],
)
